label: Transparent zinnia bloom motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Zinnia transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete zinnia bloom motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A pollinator garden zinnia bloom with layered coral-orange petals, magenta petal depth, pollen-gold center detail, a few leaf-green accents, crisp botanical geometry, and natural petal texture. Crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete bloom cutout with generous padding, no cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ffff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no dahlia, no marigold, no sunflower, no bouquet, no hand, no props, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Zinnia light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Zinnia, derived from the visible zinnia bloom cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished bright campaign-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Zinnia, Zinnia Bloom, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract coral-orange petals, magenta depth, pollen-gold focus, leaf-green success accents, pollinator-garden freshness, and radial petal geometry for marketing launches, campaign dashboards, creative briefs, and reporting tools.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, campaign cards, creative brief panels, tables, command palette, sidebar, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and token swatches.
Constraints: no generic orange UI, no unrelated neon colors, no purple-blue gradients, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Zinnia.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Zinnia dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Zinnia that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Zinnia, Zinnia Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve coral campaign actions, magenta active states, pollen-gold focus rings, leaf-green success indicators, garden-plum dark surfaces, and radial zinnia energy for launch planning and campaign analytics.
Constraints: no neon overload, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Zinnia.
